zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Westcott於1602年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾斯坦頓 拉西時，她的父親Thomas Payn28歲，母親Mrs Thomas Paine29歲。她於1622年與Thomas Edwards在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維 科華士結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1667年6月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Westcott于1602年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾斯坦頓 拉西时，她的父亲Thomas Payn28岁，母亲Mrs Thomas Paine29岁。她于1622年与Thomas Edwards在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾維 科華士结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1667年6月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Westcott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): habitational name from any of various minor places called with Old English west ‘west’ + cot ‘cottage, shelter’, for example Westcott (Surrey, Devon, Buckinghamshire), Westcot (Berkshire), or Westcote in (Gloucestershire, Hampshire, and Warwickshire).

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Westcott was born in 1602, in Stanton Lacy, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Payn, was 28 and her mother, Mrs Thomas Paine, was 29. She married Thomas Edwards in 1622, in Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 28 June 1667, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Westcott est née en 1602, à Stanton Lacy, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Payn, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs Thomas Paine, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Edwards en 1622, à Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 juin 1667, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 65 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Westcott è nata il nel 1602 nel Stanton Lacy, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Payn, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mrs Thomas Paine, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Edwards nel 1622, nel Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Westcottが1602年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアスタントン ラシで生まれた時，父Thomas Paynは28歳，母Mrs Thomas Paineは29歳であった。1622年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウイア フォーエストでThomas Edwardsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1667年6月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで65歳で死去した。

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드
ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Westcott(이)가 1602년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 스탠턴 레이시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Payn(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Thomas Paine(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1622년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 윈이르 포레스트에서 Thomas Edwards(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1667년 6월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Westcott nasceu em 1602, em Stanton Lacy, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Payn, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Thomas Paine, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Edwards em 1622, em Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de junho de 1667, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 65 anos.

ru.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Westcott родилась в 1602 г. в местности стантон ласи, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Payn было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Thomas Paine, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Edwards в 1622 г. в местности вир форест, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 28 июня 1667 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Westcott nació en 1602, en Stanton Lacy, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Payn, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs Thomas Paine, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Thomas Edwards en 1622, en Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 28 de junio de 1667, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 65 años.
